div.div:
Security & Governance Highlights:
- Centralized access control via Lake Formation
- Server-side encryption using KMS CMK
- Raw, Processed, and Query Results isolation
- Glue Crawler handles schema inference
- Athena analyst roles restricted to target workgroup
